_meta.notes: Historical rate periods. Each period defines overrides for PG&E delivery and/or CCA generation rates that apply before a given date. The rate engine uses the most recent period that starts on or before the interval date. Rates in pge_rates.json and cca_rates.json are the CURRENT (latest) rates.

E-ELEC._notes: Winter rates from actual bill data. Summer estimated from pre-March tariff (higher per-kWh, lower BSC).

EV2-A._notes: Estimated pre-March EV2-A delivery. March 2026 restructure dropped per-kWh ~$0.05-0.07 and raised BSC from ~$0.49 to ~$0.79/day.

periods.label: Pre-Feb 2026 PCE E-ELEC generation rate drop

E-ELEC._notes: PCE dropped E-ELEC generation rates significantly Feb 2026.
